The Spurs are unlikely to be motivated to trade Leonard to the Lakers.

Leonard is angry over how the Spurs handled his quad rehab and is irate with public comments made by Tony Parker.

San Antonio has been prioritizing working through the issues with Leonard, but they have encouraged rival teams to present an offer if they so choose. The Spurs, however, have been reluctant to give teams guidance on what type of trade package they are seeking.
